title: 2Pcs 06A919501 Water Temperature Sensor - Cooling Sensor Replacement for A3 A4 A6, Golf, Touran, Seat, Skoda
features: Fitment: Replacement for A3 A4 A6. Replacement for Fox Passat Golf Jetta Touran Polo Transporter. Replacement for Seat Ibiza Leon. Replacement for Skoda Fabia Octavia.

Function: The Car Coolant Water Temperature Sensor is a vital component of your vehicle's cooling system. It accurately measures the temperature of the coolant, allowing the engine to operate at optimal temperatures. This sensor plays a crucial role in preventing overheating and maintaining the engine's efficiency, ultimately contributing to the overall performance and longevity of your vehicle.

Reliable Material: Crafted with dependable components, this Car Coolant Water Temperature Sensor ensures consistent performance and accuracy. The materials used are chosen for their reliability, promising a sensor that can withstand varying temperatures and conditions, providing you with reliable data regarding your vehicle's coolant temperature.
Package Included: 2 x Temperature Sensors with Clip & O ring. As shown in the pictures. Easy to install.
